funds.thesis: Interactive entertainment infrastructure - gaming, esports, AR/VR, XR technologies. CloudTree teams with founders building fundamental infrastructure that drives interactive experiences.
funds.gaming_ai_focus: Edge computing, machine learning, XR, avatars, and blockchain for interactive entertainment. AI-powered gaming infrastructure and immersive experiences.
funds.fit_rationale: Dedicated interactive entertainment fund with explicit focus on AI/ML in gaming. Miami-based with access to LATAM gaming markets. Strong infrastructure thesis aligns with AI gaming platforms.
notable_investments: Arcturus Studios (volumetric video, raised $11M with Autodesk/Epic)
funds.recent_news: Invested in Arcturus Studios $11M round alongside Autodesk and Epic Games (Nov 2022)
funds.partner_background: 20+ years investment expertise in interactive entertainment. Team of 7 including 4 partners with deep gaming industry connections.
funds.outreach_angle: AI infrastructure for interactive entertainment - reference Arcturus/Epic Games co-investment and focus on edge computing + ML for gaming

funds.thesis: Gaming-first fund investing in game studios and game tech globally. First-check mindset with deep gaming industry expertise.
funds.gaming_ai_focus: Game tech, AI-powered game development, emerging categories in interactive entertainment. Focus on globally scalable gaming projects.
funds.fit_rationale: Pure-play gaming fund with $200M+ in exits. Strong track record with 15 portfolio companies. Turkish base provides access to emerging market talent while investing globally.
funds.recent_news: Led $1M seed round in Midas Games (Feb 2025). Two portfolio acquisitions: Paxie Games and Gleam Games.
funds.partner_background: Ismet Gökşen: 7+ years marketing/mobile advertising, former Director of EMEA & LATAM at AdColony. Volkan Biçer: Co-founder of Mobilike (acquired by AdColony), early investor in Rollic Games (acquired by Zynga for $220M).
funds.outreach_angle: AI-powered game infrastructure - reference recent Midas Games investment and gaming-first thesis. Emphasize globally scalable AI gaming technology.

funds.geographic_focus: Middle East, India, Select US Markets
funds.thesis: First media-tech VC in the MENA region focused on Sports Tech, Streaming, Gaming, and AI-powered media. Attention economy specialists.
funds.gaming_ai_focus: AI-driven, distribution-focused social & immersive gaming. AI-powered content processing, monetization and distribution for gaming.
funds.fit_rationale: Explicit AI-gaming thesis with MENA/India focus - underserved markets. Team has deep streaming/ad-tech background. Emerging fund with high conviction in AI-powered gaming.
funds.recent_news: Raising $10M maiden fund (May 2025). First media-tech VC focused on MENA region. Portfolio includes India's largest interactive entertainment platform.
funds.partner_background: Viniit Mehta: 3x founder, streaming media pioneer, led Brightcove MENA business, sits on board of Asia's second-largest video ad network. Devang Mehta (Venture Partner): 30+ years operational experience across India/Silicon Valley.
funds.outreach_angle: AI-driven immersive gaming for MENA/India markets - reference Metashot investment and attention economy expertise. Highlight AI monetization synergies.

funds.thesis: Early-stage consumer fund backing future consumer technologies. LPs are top internet creators/influencers. Focus on new customer acquisition models.
funds.gaming_ai_focus: Interactive games, gamified fintech, creator monetization, social fiction. Gaming + AI convergence for new consumer experiences.
funds.fit_rationale: Unique creator-LP network provides distribution advantages. Gaming is explicit focus area with recent investments in interactive games. Understanding of content + community for gaming distribution.
funds.recent_news: CEO Reed Duchscher also CEO of Night Media (top creator management company). Active gaming investments in 2022-2024.
funds.partner_background: Reed Duchscher: CEO of Night (next-gen talent management), built from bedroom to offices in LA, NY, Austin. Represents top creators. Ezra Cooperstein and Ben Mathews also GPs.
funds.outreach_angle: Interactive AI gaming with creator distribution - leverage Night's creator network for user acquisition. Reference portfolio investments in interactive games.

funds.thesis: Seed VC specializing in gaming, media, and entertainment. Gaming industry foundation with focus on intuitive solutions to real-life problems.
funds.gaming_ai_focus: Game mechanics applied to real-world problems, gaming infrastructure, media & entertainment innovation.
funds.fit_rationale: Gaming-native fund with strong UX/growth expertise. 20+ years experience in user acquisition and engagement. London base provides European access.
funds.recent_news: Founded in 2022. Strong foundation in gaming industry applying game mechanics to solve real-world problems.
funds.partner_background: Shana Dao and team bring 20+ years expertise in user acquisition, engagement, and growth from gaming industry. Focus on founder experience.
funds.outreach_angle: Gaming infrastructure with strong UX/engagement mechanics - reference focus on user acquisition and game design expertise.

batch_stats.thematic_focus: Emerging regional gaming specialists with AI focus
